hero.title: Your words, when they matter most.
hero.subtitle: Record voice, text, or video messages for your loved ones. You choose when they arrive.
hero.microcopy: Takes you to the message creator. No card. No commitment.

emotional.title: Your presence, at the right moment.
items: Your voice and image, even when you can no longer be there.

cards.title: For your children when they are older
cards.description: Words that will arrive when they are ready to receive them.

cards.title: For an important date
cards.description: Birthdays, anniversaries, graduations. The exact moment you choose.

cards.title: Something you want to say, but not now
cards.description: Save it. It will arrive when the moment is right.

cards.title: An anticipated supportive message
cards.description: For someone you know will need it later.

cards.title: What's hard to say in person
cards.description: Sometimes words flow better when there are no eyes involved.

cards.title: A time capsule
cards.description: A message for your future self. What would you say?

cards.title: For someone you can't talk to today
Something you don't want to forget to say
cards.description: Keep it saved. Don't let it be lost for lack of time.

cards.title: For when you are no longer present
cards.description: Your words arrive anyway. At the moment and to the person you chose.

step1.title: Create your message
step1.description: Text, audio or video. Express yourself however you like.

step2.title: You choose the moment
step2.description: A loved one, several, or even yourself in the future.

step3.title: When the time comes
step3.description: A date, a birthday, or when you are no longer present.

date.title: On a specific date
date.description: Birthdays, anniversaries, or any moment you choose.

checkin.title: When you are no longer present
checkin.description: When you are gone, we follow your instructions. Your messages arrive at the moments and to the people you chose, respecting your will and your time.

audio.title: Your voice and image
audio.description: Sometimes words aren't enough. Record audio or video messages so your loved ones can see and hear you.

trust.title: Private. Secure. Respectful.
trust.reassurance: Your messages are encrypted and only released when you decide.
trust.item2: Only delivered when conditions are met.
trust.item3: You stay in control at all times.

notWhat.title: What Carry My Words is NOT
items: Not a replacement for a person
notWhat.clarification: Carry My Words only delivers messages you left, exactly as you recorded them.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.justification: Less than a coffee a month, for peace of mind.

pro.title: Pro
features: Up to 3 trusted people to ensure delivery

landing.final_thought: Because some words aren't for now. They are for when they are needed most.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction & Acceptance
sections.body: Welcome to Carry My Words. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to form a binding agreement with us under these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility
sections.body: You must be at least 16 years old to use Carry My Words. Minors require the consent of a parent or guardian to make purchases or use premium features.

sections.heading: 3. Account Security
sections.body: You are fully responsible for maintaining the confidentiality and security of your account, including your magic links and passwords. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable Use
sections.body: Carry My Words is designed for personal and emotional messages. You agree not to use our platform to distribute illegal content, harassment, threats, spam, or malicious material.

sections.heading: 5. User Content & Ownership
sections.body: You retain full ownership and intellectual property rights over all your text, audio, and video messages. We only obtain the necessary license to store your data securely and deliver it strictly according to the rules and timelines you establish.

sections.heading: 6. Message Delivery & Scheduling
sections.body: While we strive for precise and accurate delivery, our service relies on third-party email providers. Consequently, we cannot guarantee 100% uptime, immediate inbox placement, or identical formatting on the recipient's end.

sections.heading: 7. Trusted Contacts & Check-ins
sections.body: By assigning trusted contacts, you authorize us to reach out to them if you fail to respond to your check-ins over the specified period. We are not responsible if the contact details you provide are incorrect, outdated, or unresponsive.

sections.heading: 8. Fees & Subscriptions
sections.body: Certain features (Pro features) require payment via our authorized payment processor (Stripe). Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of their billing cycle unless you cancel them beforehand.

sections.heading: 9. Refund Policy
sections.body: You may request a full refund within 14 days of your initial purchase provided you have not actively utilized the premium features (such as scheduling multiple messages or uploading video/audio). Outside of this window, payments are non-refundable.

sections.heading: 10. Disclaimers
sections.body: Our service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. Carry My Words is a messaging tool; it is not a replacement for a legal will, testament, healthcare directive, or professional legal and financial advice.

sections.heading: 11. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, our total liability to you for any damages, losses, or causes of action will not exceed the total amount you have paid us in the twelve (12) months prior to the incident. We bear no liability for emotional distress resulting from delayed or undelivered messages.

sections.heading: 12. Termination
sections.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our sole discretion if we reasonably believe you have violated these Terms of Service, particularly the acceptable use provisions.

sections.heading: 13. Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, United States, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

sections.heading: 14. Changes & Contact
sections.body: We may occasionally update these terms (reflected in the version number above). If you have questions regarding these terms, please contact us.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.body: We are deeply committed to your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use Carry My Words. We act as a data processor for the content of your scheduled messages.

sections.heading: 2. Data We Collect
sections.body: We collect the information you provide directly to us: your email, name, IP address (for security purposes), and the raw content of the messages (text, audio, and video) you compose.

sections.heading: 3. Account & Authentication
sections.body: We handle authentication via secure magic link tokens and password hashes using Supabase Auth. We do not have access to your raw password.

sections.heading: 4. Payments (Stripe)
sections.body: All payment processing is handled securely by Stripe. We do not store, process, or transmit your full credit card numbers on our servers.

sections.heading: 5. Content Storage & Encryption
sections.body: Your text, audio, and video files are securely encrypted and stored in databases and storage buckets managed by Supabase. Your messages are strictly kept private and are only released when your defined delivery conditions are met.

sections.heading: 6. Cookies & Tracking
sections.body: We use strictly necessary cookies to maintain your session and ensure platform security. We adopt a minimalist approach to tracking and do not use intrusive third-party advertising cookies.

sections.heading: 7. Analytics
sections.body: We may collect and analyze anonymous usage events (for instance, the number of 'Message Created' events) to measure and improve our application. This data never includes or exposes your personal message content.

sections.heading: 8. Retention & Deletion
sections.body: You have full control over your active messages and can delete them at any time. When you delete a message, it is permanently wiped from our active databases along with any attached media files.

sections.heading: 9. User Rights
sections.body: Depending on your location (e.g., under GDPR or CCPA), you have the right to access, correct, export, or request the deletion of your personal data.

sections.heading: 10. Children's Privacy
sections.body: Carry My Words is not intended for children under 13 years of age, and we do not knowingly collect personal data from them.

sections.heading: 11. International Transfers
sections.body: Your data is primarily stored on servers located in the United States. By using our service, you consent to this transfer and processing across borders seamlessly securely.

sections.heading: 12. Security Measures
sections.body: We enforce strict Row Level Security (RLS) in our database, encrypt all data in transit via TLS, and heavily restrict administrative access to our production environments to protect your information.

sections.heading: 13. Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please reach out to us.
